title: Scheduler-Owned Queue Operation
description: Check the explicit dispatch queue path that replaced workbench-owned scheduling.
prompt: Inspect how this repo drains durable queued work now that workbench-owned scheduling has been removed. Verify the current explicit command path uses `workbench dispatch run-due` and does not rely on `workbench tick`. Report what you checked and the current status. Do not use codex exec.

checklist: Confirm the current docs/CLI mention `workbench dispatch run-due`.
Confirm `workbench tick` is not the expected eval scenario path.
